# Recursica Monorepo

> Recursica is a design system and component library for React and Figma.

This document serves as the entry point for LLMs consuming Recursica packages. Recursica utilizes design tokens (exported from Figma as JSON) to generate framework-specific UI code.

## Packages

- [@recursica/mantine-adapter](packages/mantine-adapter/llms.txt): Primary adapter. Mantine 8+ component library.
- [@recursica/mui-adapter](packages/mui-adapter/llms.txt): Material UI (MUI) v7 component library adapter.
- [@recursica/common](packages/common/llms.txt): Shared TypeScript interfaces and types.
- [@recursica/adapter-common](packages/adapter-common/llms.txt): Framework-agnostic primitives.
- [@recursica/schemas](packages/schemas/llms.txt): JSON schemas and TypeScript definitions for Recursica configurations.

## Documentation

- [Introduction to Recursica](docs/INTRODUCTION.md)
- [README](README.md)
